---
title: "Legel 393E Spring 2025: Group Project Lab(1)"
author: "EricoYu"
description: "Group Project Lab(1): Data Structure and Preparation (simulated data)"
date: "04/30/2025"
format:
  html:
    df-print: paged
    css: "styles.css"
categories:
  - lab meeting
  - Additional practices and materials
---
